zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne De Dol於1132年出生在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉多爾-德-布利塔尼時，她的父親Jean II de Dol, Seigneur de Dol18歲，母親Basilia22歲。她於1150年與Raoul II de Fougeres結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jeanne De Dol于1132年出生在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉多爾-德-布利塔尼时，她的父亲Jean II de Dol, Seigneur de Dol18岁，母亲Basilia22岁。她于1150年与Raoul II de Fougeres结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Dol
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Manjinder, Tarsem, Ajit, Anoop, Anup, Balwinder, Hardip, Jagroop, Navdeep, Sukhpal.
Indian (Punjab): Sikh name based on the name of a Jat clan, of unexplained etymology.

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne De Dol was born in 1132, in Dol-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, her father, Jean II de Dol, Seigneur de Dol, was 18 and her mother, Basilia, was 22. She married Raoul II de Fougeres in 1150. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne De Dol est née en 1132, à Dol-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, son père, Jean II de Dol, Seigneur de Dol, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Basilia, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Raoul II de Fougeres en 1150. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne De Dol 1132 in Dol-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jean II de Dol, Seigneur de Dol 18 und ihre Mutter Basilia 22. Sie hat 1150 Raoul II de Fougeres geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne De Dol è nata il nel 1132 nel Dol-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, sua padre, Jean II de Dol, Seigneur de Dol, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Basilia, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Raoul II de Fougeres nel 1150. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Jeanne De Dolが1132年にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインドル-デ-ブレタグンで生まれた時，父Jean II de Dol, Seigneur de Dolは18歳，母Basiliaは22歳であった。1150年にRaoul II de Fougeresと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne De Dol(이)가 1132년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 도-데-브레타그니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jean II de Dol, Seigneur de Dol(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Basilia(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1150년 Raoul II de Fougeres(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne De Dol nasceu em 1132, em Dol-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Jean II de Dol, Seigneur de Dol, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Basilia, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Raoul II de Fougeres em 1150. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne De Dol родилась в 1132 г. в местности дол-де-бретагн, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция, её отцу по имени Jean II de Dol, Seigneur de Dol было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Basilia, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Raoul II de Fougeres в 1150 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в её родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeanne De Dol nació en 1132, en Dol-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Jean II de Dol, Seigneur de Dol, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Basilia, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Raoul II de Fougeres en 1150. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en su pueblo.
